nl_query: For each active evaluation attempt, show the script URN, student name, evaluator name, assignment type, attempt type, section name if split, current status, total marks, and the number of marks entries.
failed_sql: SELECT a.urn, sc.name AS student_name, fc.name AS evaluator_name, sa.assignment_type, ea.attempt_type, CASE WHEN sa.section_id IS NOT NULL THEN qs.name ELSE NULL END AS section_name, ea.status, ea.total_marks, COUNT(em.attempt_id) AS num_evaluation_marks FROM answer_script a JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id JOIN faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = sa.faculty_cache_id JOIN student_cache sc ON sc.id = a.student_id JOIN question_section qs ON qs.id = sa.section_id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.script_id = a.id JOIN evaluation_marks em ON em.attempt_id = ea.id WHERE ea.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY a.urn, sc.name, fc.name, sa.assignment_type, ea.attempt_type, CASE WHEN sa.section_id IS NOT NULL THEN qs.name ELSE NULL END, ea.status, ea.total_marks ORDER BY a.id LIMIT 500;
